EQ.reason: Pro-Q 3 has all filter types (low-pass, high-pass, band-pass, bell, shelf) with slopes up to Brickwall. Other EQs have confusing parameter mappings.

Distortion.reason: Manny M and Kramer Tape are actual tape saturation/distortion. Aphex is an exciter, not distortion.

Reverb.reason: Valhalla reverbs sound natural and have clear parameters.

Saturation.reason: Multi-band saturation allows targeting specific frequencies without affecting the whole signal.

workflow_rules: When user says 'EQ', add Pro-Q 3 - never API-550, SSL, ReaEQ, or TRACT
When user says 'distortion', add Manny M or Kramer Tape - never Aphex Exciter or EQs
When user says 'reverb', add Valhalla Room - never generic reverbs
When user says 'cut high' or 'cut highs', use Pro-Q 3 with High Cut (Low-Pass) filter, NOT high-shelf
When user says 'boost bass', use Pro-Q 3 with Low Shelf or Bell filter at 100-200Hz
